bugs.report_text: The main content area has excessive padding around its edges, pushing the board content too far inward from the screen boundaries.
The columns are positioned too close together, making it difficult to visually distinguish individual boards at a glance.
The Done column appears faded and semi-transparent, significantly reducing its visual prominence and readability compared to other columns.
bugs.neg_code: <div className="flex-shrink-0 w-96 flex flex-col bg-gradient-to-b from-slate-700 to-slate-800 rounded-xl shadow-xl overflow-hidden border border-slate-600">
bugs.pos_code: <div className="flex-shrink-0 w-96 flex flex-col bg-gradient-to-b from-slate-700 to-slate-800 rounded-xl shadow-xl overflow-hidden border border-slate-600 opacity-50">

bugs.report_text: The column header text is nearly invisible against the darker background, causing severe readability issues.
bugs.neg_code: <div className={`bg-gradient-to-r ${column.color} px-6 py-4 flex items-center justify-between`}>
bugs.pos_code: <div className={`bg-gradient-to-r ${column.color} px-6 py-4 flex items-center justify-between text-gray-800`}>

bugs.report_text: Task cards within the To Do column have excessive internal spacing, significantly reducing the number of visible tasks that fit on screen.
The add button text is too dark and blends into the button background, making it practically unreadable.
bugs.neg_code: className="px-4 py-2 bg-gradient-to-r from-blue-500 to-blue-600 text-white rounded-lg hover:from-blue-600 hover:to-blue-700 font-semibold text-sm transition-all duration-200 transform hover:scale-105"
bugs.pos_code: className="px-4 py-2 bg-gradient-to-r from-blue-500 to-blue-600 text-blue-800 rounded-lg hover:from-blue-600 hover:to-blue-700 font-semibold text-sm transition-all duration-200 transform hover:scale-105"

bugs.report_text: Task cards in the Done column have sharp, hard corners instead of the smooth rounded corners seen in other columns, creating a visual inconsistency.
bugs.neg_code: className="bg-gradient-to-br from-slate-600 to-slate-700 p-4 rounded-lg shadow-md border border-slate-500 cursor-grab hover:shadow-lg active:cursor-grabbing transition-all duration-200 hover:from-slate-500 hover:to-slate-600 hover:-translate-y-1 group"
bugs.pos_code: className="bg-gradient-to-br from-slate-600 to-slate-700 p-4 rounded-none shadow-md border border-slate-500 cursor-grab hover:shadow-lg active:cursor-grabbing transition-all duration-200 hover:from-slate-500 hover:to-slate-600 hover:-translate-y-1 group"

bugs.report_text: Task title text is too dark and difficult to read against the dark card background, severely impacting legibility.
Priority tags display with a darker appearance and reduced contrast against the task card background, making them harder to distinguish.
The visual feedback indicator when dragging a task over a column is missing or not applied, leaving users without visual confirmation of valid drop targets.
